New Media and Communication

Career Opportunities

MENU

Graduates of the New Media and Communication Department will have the opportunity to choose from a wide range of career options, as they will be able to work in various organizations using the internet and mobile networks. Some of the career opportunities are as follows;

Communication Management, Social Media Management, Content Management, which contribute to more strategic communication with target audiences and customers by using the power of digital platforms.

New Media reporting, editing, production, Portal Management and Digital Broadcast Management, which carry out the publishing activities of newspaper, radio and TV organizations via the internet and mobile environments.
